title: Corrupted Super Mario Bros.
description:
A short corruption video of Super Mario Bros. This is one code that acts similar like the IKAAAE code. Compared to that code, this one is a bit minor.

Results: Double-like mario. All enemies are half Bowser. Game flashes constantly. Game occasionally changes colors, sprites, and scenery.

I am planning to start a corruption series on retro games, and if you would enjoy watching screwed up games, then you should subscribe to me.
